criteria_results.criterion: Auth: /login renders or redirects authenticated user to /workspaces
criteria_results.evidence: Navigating to /login redirected to /workspaces with workspace list loaded. Auth guard and redirect working correctly.

criteria_results.criterion: Workspace list loads at /workspaces
criteria_results.evidence: 'My Workspace' card visible with heading and creation date. 'New Workspace' button present.

criteria_results.criterion: Canvas tab loads with nodes
criteria_results.evidence: Navigated to /w/.../[tabId] — canvas application rendered. 'New Section' group node and 'Regression Test Step' (Draft) step node visible after async data load (~2s).

criteria_results.criterion: Click step node → detail panel opens
criteria_results.evidence: Clicking 'Regression Test Step' opened step detail panel with Name textbox, Status toggles (Draft/In Progress/Testing/Live/Archived), Type, Executor, Notes, Video embed, and Delete Step button.

criteria_results.criterion: Edit step name → saves without error
criteria_results.evidence: Typed into step name textbox, tabbed away. Zero console errors and zero network errors captured by listener.

criteria_results.criterion: Click section node → section detail panel opens
criteria_results.evidence: Clicking 'New Section' opened section detail panel with Name, Summary, Steps (0), Notes fields, and Delete Section button.

criteria_results.criterion: Canvas zoom/pan controls work
criteria_results.evidence: Zoom In button clicked (reached max zoom, became disabled as expected). Fit View button clicked and activated. Controls respond without error.

criteria_results.criterion: Journey canvas checks (switch tab, touchpoint click, stage click)
criteria_results.evidence: Tab 2 exists and renders an empty canvas without error. No journey-specific nodes (touchpoints/stages) exist in this workspace — journey canvas checks #8-10 are N/A by data availability, not a regression.

criteria_results.criterion: List view → step data displayed
criteria_results.evidence: Navigated to /w/.../list. 'All Steps (1)' heading with table showing 'Regression Test Step — Workflow — Draft — 3/2/2026'. Search, sort, and filter controls present.

criteria_results.criterion: Gap analysis page renders
criteria_results.evidence: URL /w/.../gap-analysis renders the canvas shell without crash or error. Note: this URL resolves to the [tabId] canvas route in production build, suggesting the dedicated gap-analysis view is either deployed behind this route or not yet in production.

criteria_results.criterion: Compare view renders
criteria_results.evidence: URL /w/.../compare renders canvas shell without crash or error. Same routing note as gap-analysis.

criteria_results.criterion: Settings page loads
criteria_results.evidence: Page renders 'Workspace Settings' with Workspace Name textbox, Save Changes button, and Danger Zone / Delete Workspace section. Zero console errors.

criteria_results.criterion: Teams page loads
criteria_results.evidence: Page renders 'Teams Canvas / Coming in Phase 1' stub — expected per known issues in testing/apps/stride.md.

criteria_results.criterion: Perspectives section displays in settings
criteria_results.evidence: No Perspectives section rendered — workspace has zero perspectives created, so section is correctly absent (data-conditional render). Settings page itself loads without errors. Full DOM text confirmed via evaluate().

criteria_results.criterion: No new console errors across tested pages
criteria_results.evidence: Mega listener active on settings and canvas pages. __testErrors.length = 0, __networkErrors.length = 0 on all pages where listener was active.

criteria_results.criterion: #BUG-025: Zero native confirm() calls in settings/page.tsx
criteria_results.evidence: Grep for 'confirm(' in src/app/(app)/w/[workspaceId]/settings/page.tsx returned zero matches. Native confirm() fully removed.

criteria_results.criterion: #BUG-025: Radix Dialog added with confirmDeletePerspectiveOpen state, perspectiveToDelete state, and consequence text
criteria_results.evidence: Grep confirmed: line 354 — confirmDeletePerspectiveOpen state, line 355 — perspectiveToDelete state, line 450 — Dialog component open={confirmDeletePerspectiveOpen}, line 453 — DialogTitle 'Delete Perspective', line 455 — consequence text 'All annotations for this perspective will be permanently removed.'

criteria_results.criterion: #FEAT-035: Migration 022 created with correct enums, table, RLS, index, and trigger
criteria_results.evidence: supabase/migrations/022_improvement_ideas.sql exists. Verified: improvement_status (5 values), improvement_priority (4 values), improvement_ideas table, ON DELETE SET NULL for all 3 FK links, reuses update_updated_at() trigger, workspace index, 4 RLS policies using can_access_workspace().

criteria_results.criterion: #FEAT-035: TypeScript types and client wrappers present
criteria_results.evidence: database.ts lines 410-419: ImprovementStatus, ImprovementPriority, ImprovementIdea exported. client.ts: fetchImprovementIdeas (line 756), createImprovementIdea (766), updateImprovementIdea (783), deleteImprovementIdea (791) — all 4 wrappers present.

criteria_results.criterion: #IMP-052: Grid lines at 25%/75% with border-subtle, axis labels, existing elements preserved
criteria_results.evidence: prioritization-view.tsx: Y-axis labels at line 181, X-axis labels at line 285. Dashed grid lines at 25% and 75% (vertical + horizontal) using border: '1px dashed var(--border-subtle)', opacity: 0.35 at lines 206-223. Existing quadrant center lines preserved at lines 203-204.

improvements_found.observation: 4 icon-only buttons on the canvas page have no accessible name (no aria-label, no text content). Affects at least 3 buttons: the sidebar collapse button and tab-bar action buttons. These are pre-existing issues, not introduced by iteration 107.
improvements_found.design_principle: WCAG 2.1 SC 4.1.2: Name, Role, Value — interactive elements must have accessible names
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Add aria-label attributes to all icon-only buttons (e.g., aria-label='Collapse sidebar', aria-label='Close tab')

improvements_found.observation: Perspectives section only renders when perspectives exist. There is no 'Add your first perspective' empty state with a CTA. New users see a settings page with only workspace name and danger zone, with no hint that perspectives exist or how to create them.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H6: Recognition rather than recall — features should be discoverable without prior knowledge
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Always render the PerspectivesSection with an empty state (e.g., 'No perspectives yet — Create one to track different stakeholder views') and an Add Perspective button visible even at 0 count
